---
title: "Visualizing Greenhouse Farming in Finland"
---

## {.toolbar}
<div id="slider-target"></div>

## Row
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
import numpy as np
from scipy.stats import linregress

# Data Preprocessing

df = pd.read_csv("gh_yields.csv")

df['Year'] = df['Year'].astype(str)

# shaded areas for missing values
df['missing'] = df.isna().any(axis=1)
df['missing'] = df['missing'] | df.groupby('Crop')['missing'].shift(periods=-1, fill_value=False)


def get_common_base_year(df, variables):
    return (
        df.dropna(subset=variables)
          .groupby('Crop')['Year']
          .min()
    )

def transform_index(df, variables):
    base_year = get_common_base_year(df, variables)
    
    indices = {'Year': df['Year'], 'Crop': df['Crop'], 'missing': df['missing']}
    
    for v in variables:
        base_values = (
            df.set_index(['Crop', 'Year'])[v]
        )
        
        indices[v] = df.groupby('Crop')[v].transform(
            lambda x: x / base_values.loc[x.name, base_year.loc[x.name]] * 100
        )
    
    return pd.DataFrame(indices)

def calc_var(series):
    return series.pct_change(fill_method=None).std()

def calc_growth(series):

    clean_data = series.dropna()
    if len(clean_data) > 2:
        log_y = np.log(clean_data)
        x = np.arange(len(log_y)) # The time delta is 1 year
        slope = linregress(x, log_y).slope
        # convert the slope to percent change in Y. 
        return (np.exp(slope) - 1) * 100
    else:
        return np.nan


# 1. Calculate statistics
def get_stats(group):

    pct_std = calc_var(group)

    growth = calc_growth(group)
    
    return pd.Series({
        'pct_std': pct_std,
        'growth_rate': growth
    })


areas = df.groupby('Crop')['Area'].sum().rename('sum_area')

indices = transform_index(df, ['Area', 'Yield', 'Productivity'])


stats_df = df.melt(id_vars=['Crop'], value_vars=['Productivity','Yield','Area'])

stats_df = stats_df.groupby(['Crop', 'variable']).apply(lambda x: get_stats(x['value']), include_groups=False).reset_index()

stats_df = stats_df.merge(areas, on='Crop')

# merge for sorting of facets
indices = indices.merge(areas, on='Crop')

# get the list of crops to maintain consistent colors
crops = stats_df['Crop'].unique().tolist()

## Visualization

# For selecting crop from scatter plot
selection = alt.selection_point(fields=['Crop'], on='click', toggle=True, value='Tomatoes', empty=False)

options = ['Productivity', 'Area', 'Yield']
labels = ['Productivity ', 'Cultivation Area ', 'Yield ']

input_dropdown = alt.binding_select(options=options, labels=labels, name='Selected Measurement: ',     element='#slider-target')

measure = alt.selection_point(fields=['variable'],value='Productivity', bind=input_dropdown)

base = alt.Chart(stats_df).encode(
    x=alt.X('growth_rate:Q', 
            title='Growth Rate (%)',
            scale=alt.Scale(zero=False, padding=10)).axis(grid=False),
    y=alt.Y('pct_std:Q', 
            title='Variability',
            scale=alt.Scale(zero=False, padding=50)).axis(grid=False),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip('Crop:N'),
        alt.Tooltip('growth_rate:Q', format='.2f', title='Growth Rate'),
        alt.Tooltip('pct_std:Q', format='.3f', title='Variability'),
        alt.Tooltip('sum_area:Q', format=',.0f', title='Cumulative Cultivation Area')
    ]
).transform_filter(measure)


# The Scatter Points
points = base.mark_circle(stroke='black', opacity=0.9).add_params(
    selection
).encode(
    size=alt.Size('adj_area:Q'). 
                  title('Cumulative Cultivation Area (m^2)').legend(None).scale(range=[0, 7000], zero=True),
    color=alt.Color('Crop:N', legend=None).scale(domain=crops, scheme='tableau20'),
    strokeWidth=alt.when(selection).then(alt.StrokeWidthValue(1.5)).otherwise(alt.StrokeWidthValue(0)),
    order=alt.Order('sum_area:Q', sort='descending')
).add_params(measure).transform_calculate(
    adj_area = alt.expr.pow(alt.datum.sum_area, 1.1432)
) # Flannery scaling

zero = alt.Chart().mark_rule(color='lightGrey').encode(
    x=alt.datum(0)
)

# Interactive Labels
labels = base.mark_text(
    align='left',
    baseline='middle',
    fontSize=12,
    dx = alt.expr(alt.datum.dis)
).encode(
    text='Crop:N',
).transform_filter(selection).transform_calculate(
    dis = alt.expr.max(alt.expr.sqrt(alt.datum.sum_area) / 2.1, 5)
)

# Facet line charts
base = alt.Chart(indices).transform_fold(
    ['Area', 'Yield', 'Productivity'],
    as_=['variable', 'Index Value']
).encode(
    alt.X('Year:T', timeUnit='year').axis(grid=True, tickCount=6, labelAngle=45).title('Year').scale(domain=[2014,2025]),
).properties(
    width=180,
    height=150
)
   
lines = base.mark_line(point=True).encode(
    alt.Y('Index Value:Q').title('Index Value').axis(grid=False),
    strokeWidth=alt.when(measure).then(alt.StrokeWidthValue(3)).otherwise(alt.StrokeWidthValue(2)),
    opacity=alt.when(measure).then(alt.OpacityValue(1)).otherwise(alt.OpacityValue(0.5)),
    color=alt.Color('variable:N').legend(title=" ",
    labelExpr='if(datum.value == "Area", "Cultivation Area", datum.value)')
)

baseline = base.transform_calculate(
    baseline='100'
).mark_line(color='lightGray', strokeWidth=1).encode(
    y='baseline:Q'
)

rect = base.mark_rect(opacity=0.1, color='grey').transform_calculate(
    start = "datum.Year",
    end = "timeOffset('year', datum.Year, 1)"
).encode(
    x="start:T",
    x2="end:T"
).transform_filter(
    alt.datum.missing==True
)


line_chart = rect + baseline + lines

details_chart = line_chart.facet(
    facet=alt.Facet('Crop:N', title=None).sort(field='sum_area', op='max', order='descending'),
    columns=2,
    
).properties(
    title={
        "text": "Index Charts for Selected Crops",
        "subtitle": ["How have the crop measurements changed relative to a baseline.",
        "Grey regions indicate periods containing missing values."]
    }
).transform_filter(
    selection
)


main = (zero + points + labels).properties(
    title=alt.Title(text=alt.expr(f'"Crop " + {measure.name}.variable + ": Growth Rate vs. Variability*"'),
    subtitle=["Click on a circle to explore. Hold the Shift key while clicking to select/deselect multiple crops.",
        "Circle area encodes cumulative cultivation area."]),
    width=600,
    height=400)

# Layer and Configure
alt.hconcat(main, details_chart).configure_view(stroke=None).resolve_scale(
     strokeWidth='independent',
     color='independent',
).resolve_legend(
    color='independent',
    size='independent'
).configure(
    autosize=alt.AutoSizeParams(resize=True)
).configure_title(
    anchor='middle',
    fontSize=20,
    offset=30,
    subtitlePadding=20,
)

```

## Row {height=250}
::: {.card}
*For each crop:

- **Productivity** is defined as the yield (kg) divided by the cultivation area ($m^2$) 
- **Variability** is calculated as the standard deviation of the yearly fractional change in the measurement.
- **Growth Rate** is estimated using the fitted slope from a log-linear regression model. For example, a growth rate of 5% would lead to a $(1.05)^{10} = 1.63$ times increase over 10 years.

Data is accessed from [Natural Resources Institute Finland](https://statdb.luke.fi/PxWeb/pxweb/en/LUKE/LUKE__maa__puutar/0500_puutar.px/) for the period 2014-2025.  

:::
